age_range.evidence: We conducted 17 semi-structured interviews in which participants (UK-based, aged 18–25, with experience of disordered eating or an ED) described their experiences of using TikTok.

countries.evidence: We conducted 17 semi-structured interviews in which participants (UK-based, aged 18–25, with experience of disordered eating or an ED) described their experiences of using TikTok.

gender_split.evidence: All the participants whose extracts are analysed identified as female

sample_size.evidence: In total, there were 67 responses to the EOI form with 30 participants responding to a follow-up email and consenting to an online interview, which was held and recorded via Microsoft Teams.
